overall.description: A smooth drone camera tour around a submarine in a harbor setting, captured in Microsoft Flight Simulator. The camera moves from the wooden bow deck, over the forward railing, and along the port side past the conning tower to the stern, showcasing detailed texturing and calm water reflections under clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden deck of submarine in calm harbor

agents.ego_description: moving forward along the wooden deck toward the bow of the submarine

entered.detail: striped wooden decking with weathered tan and brown planks
calm blue ocean water surrounding the vessel on both sides
multi-span concrete bridge visible on the horizon
circular metal mooring bollard mounted on the deck

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along the wooden deck of a submarine in a calm harbor. The striped wooden planks stretch ahead toward a distant concrete bridge, with calm blue water visible on both sides of the vessel.

events.description: camera moves from wooden deck onto the metal bow railing structure and descends toward water level

agents.ego_description: navigating over the bow railing and descending to water level alongside the hull

entered.detail: triangular metal railing framework at the bow of the submarine
smooth painted hull transitioning from white to black

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the bow and navigates over the triangular metal railing structure. The wooden deck disappears from view as the camera descends alongside the hull, revealing the smooth black and white painted surface of the submarine's bow.

scene_state.functional_zone: port side of submarine at water level

agents.ego_description: moving along the port side of the hull at water level, revealing portholes and approaching the conning tower

entered.detail: low-rise industrial buildings and trees along the distant shoreline
the sail structure with periscopes and antenna masts

segments.scene_description: Moving along the port side at water level, the camera reveals the submarine's hull with its row of portholes. The conning tower becomes visible in the distance while harbor buildings line the shore to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: conning tower and stern section of submarine

events.description: hull number '287' becomes visible on the stern section

agents.ego_description: circling past the conning tower with its deck gun and continuing toward the stern

entered.detail: naval artillery cannon mounted on the forward deck of the conning tower
painted white number 287 on the black stern hull
rear section of the submarine with diving planes and rudder

segments.scene_description: The camera circles past the conning tower, revealing the deck gun and periscope masts silhouetted against the sun. Continuing toward the stern, the hull number '287' becomes visible as the camera approaches the rear diving planes and tail section.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins atop the wooden deck of a submarine and descends to glide along its hull toward the stern. It begins by moving steadily forward over striped wooden planks toward a distant concrete bridge, with calm blue water flanking the vessel. As the camera reaches the bow, it navigates over the triangular metal railing and descends to reveal the smooth black and white painted surface of the hull. The scene then shifts to a water-level perspective along the port side, passing a row of portholes and harbor buildings before circling the conning tower, deck gun, and periscope masts silhouetted against the sun. Finally, the camera continues toward the rear, passing the hull number 287 to reveal the diving planes and tail section.
